reviews.review_description: When is co-op mode gonna come out so I can play with my friends

developer_response.body:
Episode 2 will support co-op. However, this current episode is too difficult to convert to co-op at this stage.
If there is enough interest from players, I may add another high quality map soon

reviews.review_description: I give it a 3 cause I wish it was 2 player im not going in there alone! F that

developer_response.body:
Episode 2 will support co-op. However, this current episode is too difficult to convert to co-op at this stage.
If there is enough interest from players, I may add another high quality map soon
Please give me a 5 stars,  I need more good feedback to get more ppl interest, to motive  for more dev works.

reviews.review_description: Scared the crap out of me

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 stars, and please enjoy the scary moment.

reviews.review_description: Very creepy but fun

developer_response.body: Thank you, and I am glad you like the scary moments. :)

reviews.review_description: In the game i heard a very loud scream it scared me that i left

developer_response.body:
Thank you, and I am glad you like the scary moments. 
Its a game, dont worry about it :) nothing will happen ...  haha

reviews.review_description: super creepy game.  Great graphics. Couldn't keep playing because it was too jumpy for me which I usually like, but too much for me. Great job creating this creepy game 😁

developer_response.body: Haha, thank you! VR really is the best way to experience ghosts and horror — nothing else feels quite as real!

reviews.review_description:
It’s a great game, super creepy, jumpy and what you want from a game like this. 

But there was some glitches where my hand got stuck to the piano and my hand turned green, i couldn’t do anything from then with that hand and had to restart the game. Then i ended up going through after getting stuck and somehow ended up on the next floor up but couldn’t get down through the stairs because of the crates.

developer_response.body:
I am glad you like the scary moment, and thanks for the feedback.

We have collected all the feedback and are going to fix it in the next release.

reviews.review_description: I like it 🤜🔥🤛

developer_response.body: Thank you, and I am glad you like the scary moments. :)

reviews.review_description: Stop lt your scaring me!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and enjoy the scare moment :)

reviews.review_description: This game made me blow up my pants can’t wait for a scarier monster!

developer_response.body: Haha, thanks for playing the game! This is exactly why you want a VR headset—for moments like that scary experience!

reviews.review_description:
The game is very fun the first time I played every sound was like a mini heart attack I really like the setting the sound is great and the gameplay is gripping, complete the hospital map and the prison I loved it but the map of the school is perfect after the last patch the key to the lab is working and I finally complete this wonderful map and I defeated the evil and free the kids =3

Thank  you for support and for you Response I seriously think you gone a best developer

 
other than that I really enjoyed playing your game I hope you continue to grow as an unroller and I look forward to playing your future projects or other maps =D

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your kind feedback. Congratulations on completing the school map. 

I am really glad that you enjoyed the time and effort it took to finish all the maps. I am working on PI 2, which will involve multi-players and spending a long night in a castle.

reviews.review_description:
I gave 5 stars… so PLEASE gave us the coop mode… cause I’m too scared to play alone!!

(Worst thing is that it’s the true 😅🙏 please consider it)

developer_response.body: haha , I heard you :)   I am making the new map, and it will have co-op.  However, I have also considered making coop on the first three maps.   may be just two players.

reviews.review_description:
This game is not for the easily frightened.  Well done graphics combined with some nice audio make for a really creepy atmosphere.  There are parts that just make you wonder what was the dev thinking about.  

If you like being scared, try it out.  I made a short video of me trying to play the game: https://youtu.be/hjyx-ykYUmg

developer_response.body: haha, thanks for the video and 5 stars. The idea of first map came from a ghost house theme park I experienced in Japan - fuji Q haunted hospital.  I went there back in 2000 and it is a life time experience. Really Scary.  The map 2 is came from Seven Wonders, a common trope in Japanese schools.

reviews.review_description: Ok, I walked into this thinking it wouldn’t be that scary….. I didn’t make it past the main area I heard screaming and took off my headset this game is amazing. Can’t wait for them to add more to it

developer_response.body: It is excellent to hear you enjoyed the scary moment. We are closing map 2 and completing the stories. It should be out in the next two months.  Next map is about school, and much more scary events.

reviews.review_title: i really like the game but i need help
reviews.review_description:
I really like the game but I'm stuck I've tried everything but I don't understand, it would have been possible to guide me
I would really like to play the sequel

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.  I am releasing a newer version 2.2.0 with more hints and bug fixes.  The finish game rate is 1% at the moment, and most ppl ignored the mobile phone :)   The new patch should be out in 2 weeks, and will have much more helps.

reviews.review_description: Stop using this environment. Just stop it. I've seen it in used like close to a dozen VR spooky crapllications since 2015. On top of that, it's as dark, and cumbersome and as you can expect. Darkness in VR sucks, but then stuff like this makes you hold a cell phone and a flashlight and it's just a big blurry pixelated pain.
I thought the game was fun but I think if it was multiplayer I’d give it 5 stars

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. MP requires a longer time to test and re-design. The first map is too small.  I am planning to have multiplayer for the 2nd map and co-op up to 4 players.

reviews.review_description: It’s trash and you can’t do anything the light turns off for no reason and it’s just confusing

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, the torch switched off in some areas on purpose. The bathroom needs to be uncursed by the holy cross, and the Morgue requires crystal. Hope this help.

reviews.review_description: I love the game its so good I need play the new update and I love it its so scary it's a great game what you do on the new update the woman said brun her body and the boy says find its sole how I burn her body and find he's sole please help me I doint understand what to do on the game

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your kind comment, and I'm glad to hear you love the game.  The map is already released, you may have to update the game to see it.  The new game is over 2GB. Hope you can find it without problem.

Update should be automatic by meta, however you can try un-install the game and re-install via App Lab: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/4461235083906200/?utm_source=developer.oculus.com&utm_medium=oculusredirect

reviews.review_description: I finally finish it! The game was confusing at first & took time to realize what to do. But it’s worth it, I’ve never been more scared playing a game, I literally had to mute the sound & only turn it on when the phone rings bc it was so scary! I definitely recommend this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback.  It is encouraging to hear that you enjoyed the scary moment in the game, and that's what we wanted to bring to the player. The 2nd map is coming soon, and it will be much bigger and have more scary elements.
